mlb_player_props.method: Consensus-qualified player props using season, history, L10, and matchup signals as supporting inputs

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 6.89 K/9 over 18 appearances (18 starts)
Minnesota Twins lineup pitch-type K matchup resistant (2182 pitches): sinkers 28% mix: 15% whiff, 7% K-ending PA; cutters 23% mix: 26% whiff, 18% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal sinkers 28%, cutters 23%, four-seamers 17% with 20.6% whiffs/swing
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 68.9%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 27.9%; Under history hit rate 51-71 (71.8%)

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication
Season workload 8.65 K/9 over 8 appearances (8 starts)
Tampa Bay Rays lineup pitch-type K matchup neutral (2212 pitches): four-seamers 43% mix: 22% whiff, 20% K-ending PA; sliders 19% mix: 25% whiff, 22% K-ending PA
Pitcher recent arsenal four-seamers 43%, sliders 19%, changeups 16% with 18.8% whiffs/swing
picks.matchup: New York Yankees @ Tampa Bay Rays
picks.reason: The active four-model consensus gate qualifies this market at 63.2%; the All Time variant is retained as a supporting signal.
picks.research_details: History model over probability 33.0%; Under history hit rate 36-100 (36.0%)

key_factors: Active four-model consensus gate qualified publication

Pitcher recent arsenal four-seamers 37%, sliders 28%, changeups 12% with 36.2% whiffs/swing

wnba_3pm.method: WNBA 3PM props using 3PA volume, shrinkage-adjusted 3P%, season/history profiles, L10 form, venue, opponent, injury, and consensus gates
